basics.name: Seol Ah Park, Ph.D.
basics.label: Postdoctoral Fellow
basics.summary: Researcher with expertise in image analysis, mathematical modeling, and computational algorithms for biomedical data. Focus on developing image processing techniques and advanced methods for analyzing and integrating multidimensional data.

work.name: Slovak University of Technology in Bratislava
work.summary: Topological data analysis applied to tumor-immune cell interactions and macrophage behavior analysis

work.summary: Biomedical image processing and computational workflows

work.name: EU H2020 Marie Skłodowska-Curie Project (ImageInLife, Grant ID: 721537)
work.summary: Segmentation-based cell tracking in microscopy videos. Secondments at CNRS Montpellier (France), CNRS Gif-sur-Yvette (France), and Leiden University (Netherlands).

education.summary: Thesis: Tracking cells in 2D+time and 3D+time image sequences
